payload.title: Make the dialect itself easier to adopt
payload.description: Strategic direction after the first external adopter (RT-99): the right answer to 'the dialect is too hard to adopt' is to make THE DIALECT easier — not to reposition Trust as a linter. The 0.2 advisory mode is an on-ramp/teaser; this epic is about getting people through the door to the actual product (one-pass enforcement incl. R0042). Targets the real friction the reviewer hit when trying to use the dialect, plus the remaining-depth notes from RT-102/105/106.
